title: Develop and manage international business operations
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop and manage international business operations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify and analyse impacts of international factors on the business operation and functions

pcs.text: Confirm core activities, customer base, business values and current business direction
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm core activities, customer base, business values and current business direction?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm core activities, customer base, business values and current business direction.

pcs.text: Review performance data from all areas of the business to identify strengths, weaknesses and critical success factors relevant to international business activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review performance data from all areas of the business to identify strengths, weaknesses and critical success factors relevant to international business activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review performance data from all areas of the business to identify strengths, weaknesses and critical success factors relevant to international business activity.

pcs.text: Identify and analyse trends and developments trends for their potential impact on international business activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and analyse trends and developments trends for their potential impact on international business activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and analyse trends and developments trends for their potential impact on international business activity.

pcs.text: Gather and analyse comparative international market information as a basis for reviewing business performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Gather and analyse comparative international market information as a basis for reviewing business performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Gather and analyse comparative international market information as a basis for reviewing business performance.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess current capabilities to identify areas for improvement or exploitation within international markets.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse international market performance of existing and potential competitors and their products or services to identify potential opportunities or threats.

pcs.text: Identify and analyse legal, ethical and environmental constraints of the international market for their effect on international business activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and analyse legal, ethical and environmental constraints of the international market for their effect on international business activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and analyse legal, ethical and environmental constraints of the international market for their effect on international business activity.

pcs.text: Identify current and emerging needs in international markets that link positively to the business's strengths or capabilities

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify current and emerging needs in international markets that link positively to the business's strengths or capabilities.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify business needs in terms of changes required to address international market opportunities.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a positioning implementation plan according to organisational requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify international business options and develop strategies for products, pricing, sourcing, logistics, promotion and distribution.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify options and proposed strategies for international business payments, investment capital and accounting and taxation issues.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop or amend operational plans to address international business activity according to organisational requirements.
